ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_label" TEXT /* Label representing the size (e.g., XS, S, M) */,
  "numeric_size" INTEGER /* Numeric size associated with the clothing size */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the size is intended (e.g., Men, Women) */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group (e.g., Adult, Child) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the size was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the size */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the size is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement entry */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corresponding size */,
  "natural_waist" TEXT /* Natural waist measurement for the size */,
  "thigh" TEXT /* Thigh measurement for the size */,
  "hip" TEXT /* Hip measurement for the size */,
  "chest" TEXT /* Chest measurement for the size */,
  "sleeve_length" TEXT /* Sleeve length measurement for the size */,
  "inseam" TEXT /* Inseam measurement for pants */,
  "shoulder_width" TEXT /* Shoulder width measurement */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the measurement was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the measurement */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the measurement is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., pants, shirts) */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size associated with the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand name of the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material used in the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the product */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the product is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being returned */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size associated with the returned product */,
  "return_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return (e.g., too small, too large) */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date when the return was processed */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who returned the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the return was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the return entry */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the return entry is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product sold */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size sold */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of products sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date when the sale occurred */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the purchase */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the sale was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the sale entry */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the sale entry is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., designer, merchandiser) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken by the user (e.g., view size chart) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location from which the access occurred */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the access log was recorded */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the access log is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
